title: King Prawn and Crunchy Vegetable Crumble
description: A delicious and easy-to-make seafood dish featuring king prawns and a crunchy vegetable topping. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Rinse the prawns and pat dry with paper towels.
Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Transfer the prawns to a baking dish.
Mix crunchy and kenyan in a bowl.
Top the prawns with the crunchy mixture.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, until the topping is golden brown.
